name: Tiramisu 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat heavy cream with sugar until stiff. Set aside.
2. Using the same beater, beat together ricotta, sugar, and sour cream.
3. Gently fold in the cream and cheese mixtures; add rum.
4. Line an 8 x 13 inch baking dish with ladyfingers that have been soaked in coffee.
5. Pour the cream mixture over the cake layers.
6. Let set for at least 4 hours or overnight.
7. Top with unsweetened cocoa before serving.
